channel.title: Healths on Expat Japan
channel.description: Recent content in Healths on Expat Japan

item.title: How to See a Doctor in Japan as a Foreigner (Complete Guide)
item.description: How to visit a clinic or hospital in Japan as a foreigner. What to bring, what to say, how to find English-speaking doctors, and what to expect.

item.title: Best Private Health Insurance for Foreigners in Japan (2025)
item.description: Do you need private health insurance in Japan? Compare the best options for foreigners — what's covered, how much it costs, and who needs it.

item.title: How Japanese Health Insurance Works for Foreigners (2025)
item.description: Confused about health insurance in Japan? This guide explains exactly how it works for foreigners — what's covered, how much you pay, and how to use it.
